label: Transparent blue crab motif source
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source for a catalog design system
Primary request: Create only an isolated blue crab shell motif, full subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A blue crab viewed slightly from above with a sculptural blue-green shell, olive-tinted claws, cream underside highlights, cobalt edge markings, subtle speckling, hard shell ridges, pointed lateral spines, and realistic crustacean anatomy. The shell and claws should be the visual source for a coastal operations design system.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; do not crop the shell, claws, legs, or lateral spines.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves glossy shell ridges, mineral blue surface, olive claw detail, and cream highlights without casting a floor shadow.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no sand, no water, no table, no decorative background, no second crab, no seafood plating, no cast shadow, no contact shadow.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Blue Crab", derived from the visible isolated blue crab motif with blue-green shell, olive claws, cream underside, cobalt edges, speckled ridges, and coastal estuary character.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 board composition, designed as a 3840x2160 source image. Keep all text and UI labels large, crisp, and readable at gallery preview scale.
Required visible sections: Morphous Blue Crab, Blue Crab, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows, Generated Assets.
Design mood: coastal operations system for harbor, estuary, fleet, permits, inspections, sensor telemetry, and work queues. Quiet, utilitarian, precise, scan-friendly, operational product UI.
Palette: derive colors from the motif only: blue shell, deep harbor blue, oxidized teal, olive claw, cream belly, brine mist, sand neutral, shell edge amber, ink navy. Use restrained contrast and avoid unrelated saturated colors.
Typography: show English product UI guidance and Japanese typography guidance. Include short examples such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Metrics, 港湾業務, 監視, 状態, 検索.
UI coverage: buttons with icon placeholders, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, segmented tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command palette/search field, sidebar navigation, top navigation, dashboard metric cards, timeline, line/bar charts, status chips, empty/loading/error states.
Tokens: show semantic token rows for background, foreground, primary, secondary, accent, muted, border, ring, chart colors, sidebar tokens. Include visible radius samples capped at 2px, 4px, 6px, 8px; spacing samples on an 8px grid; shadow samples that are low and coastal.
Texture: include subtle blue crab shell speckling, carapace ridge lines, claw-olive swatches, cream shell underside surfaces, and thin shell-edge dividers. Keep cards radius 8px or less.
Layout style: premium shadcn/tweakcn-compatible board, precise grid, professional design-system documentation, no nested cards, no oversized marketing hero, realistic app components on a calm light background.
Text constraints: use short readable labels; no long paragraphs; no random brand names; spell "Morphous Blue Crab" correctly.
Avoid: purple gradients, neon, decorative blobs, stock beach photography, seafood restaurant styling, cartoon crab mascots, cropped motif, illegible microtext, watermark.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a dark-mode version of the visible "Morphous Blue Crab" design-system board. It must feel like the same coastal operations system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Preserve the visible blue crab motif and the visible light-board structure: blue shell palette, olive claws, cream underside, shell speckle texture, carapace ridge dividers, harbor operations navigation, dashboard/data examples, forms, tables, command/search, status, tokens, radius, spacing, shadows, and generated assets.
Canvas: exact wide 16:9 board composition, designed as a 3840x2160 source image. Keep all text and UI labels large, crisp, and readable at gallery preview scale.
Required visible sections: Morphous Blue Crab, Blue Crab, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Tables, Command/Search, Status, Tokens, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadows, Generated Assets.
Design mood: coastal operations system for harbor, estuary, fleet, permits, inspections, sensor telemetry, and work queues. Quiet, utilitarian, precise, scan-friendly, operational product UI.
Dark palette: background from ink navy and deep harbor blue; foreground from brine mist and cream belly; primary from blue shell; secondary from oxidized teal; accent from olive claw; warning/accent from shell edge amber. Keep contrast accessible and restrained.
Typography: show English product UI guidance and Japanese typography guidance. Include short examples such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Metrics, 港湾業務, 監視, 状態, 検索.
UI coverage: buttons with icon placeholders, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, segmented tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command palette/search field, sidebar navigation, top navigation, dashboard metric cards, timeline, line/bar charts, status chips, empty/loading/error states.
Tokens: show semantic token rows for background, foreground, primary, secondary, accent, muted, border, ring, chart colors, sidebar tokens. Include visible radius samples capped at 2px, 4px, 6px, 8px; spacing samples on an 8px grid; shadow samples that are low and coastal.
Texture: include subtle blue shell speckling, carapace ridge lines, olive claw swatches, cream shell underside surfaces, and thin shell-edge dividers. Keep cards radius 8px or less.
Layout style: premium shadcn/tweakcn-compatible board, precise grid, professional design-system documentation, no nested cards, no oversized marketing hero, realistic app components on a dark estuary operations surface.
Text constraints: use short readable labels; no long paragraphs; no random brand names; spell "Morphous Blue Crab" correctly.
Avoid: purple gradients, neon overload, pure black-only background, decorative blobs, stock beach photography, seafood restaurant styling, cartoon crab mascots, cropped motif, illegible microtext, watermark.
